creator: mharo@bitsurf.net
text:
After a couple hours of uptime my machine will lock up.  I enabled the software watchdog which will make the machine panic and reboot.  This is the only way i know to keep the machine running.

	I'm not sure what to do to help debug this more.  I'm running 7.2-STABLE source that was synced yesterday.
	The kernel stack backtrace always has network related functions in it.   Here are the last 10 backtraces:

	I didn't use jails prior to 7.2 so I'm not sure if this is a new issue or one that was introduced by 7.2.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: 	Start the jail and wait a few hours.
